what: Create session state file with initial metadata
why: Initialize session tracking (timestamps, prompt count, loaded packages)

output.console: Session state creation confirmation with file path
output.file: Session state JSON file with initial metadata (session_id, created_at, prompt_count, loaded_packages)

success_handling.criteria: Session state file is created with initial metadata including session ID, creation timestamp, zero prompt count, and empty loaded packages list

error_handling.criteria: Filesystem returns EACCES or EPERM when attempting to write the session state file
error_handling.action: Abort session creation, report permission error
